languages.text: "Не спешите, коллега. Врачуй разумом, не лекарствами — вот одна из главных мудростей Медике". {n}Вивисектор несколько секунд всматривается в лицо раненого.{/n} "Возможно, присутствие Вашей Светлости придаст сил пациенту. Попробуйте поддержать больного, пока мы пытаемся стабилизировать его состояние".

"Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."
languages.original_text: "Не спешите, коллега. Врачуй разумом, не лекарствами — вот одна из главных мудростей Медике". {n}Вивисектор несколько секунд всматривается в лицо раненого.{/n} "Возможно, присутствие Вашей Светлости придаст сил пациенту. Попробуйте поддержать больного, пока мы пытаемся стабилизировать его состояние".

traits.locale_text: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with drugs — that's one of the key wisdoms of Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

"Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with drugs — that's one of the key wisdoms of Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

"Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with drugs — that's one of the key wisdoms of Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

languages.text: «No tenga tanta prisa, estimado colega. Sanar con la mente y no con medicamentos es uno de los preceptos clave del Officio Medicae». {n}El vivisector mira al hombre herido durante unos segundos.{/n} «Tal vez la presencia de mi{mf|lord|lady} dé fuerzas al paciente. Intente prestarle apoyo mientras estabilizamos su condición».
languages.original_text: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

traits.locale_text: «No tenga tanta prisa, estimado colega. Sanar con la mente y no con medicamentos es uno de los preceptos clave del Officio Medicae». {n}El vivisector mira al hombre herido durante unos segundos.{/n} «Tal vez la presencia de mi{mf|lord|lady} dé fuerzas al paciente. Intente prestarle apoyo mientras estabilizamos su condición».

languages.text: “别这么心急，同僚。治疗要靠头脑，而非药物——这是医疗部最核心的智慧之一。”{n}解剖者盯着伤员的脸看了一会儿。{/n}“或许，大人的到来能给病人带来力量。请试着安抚病人，与此同时，我们会设法稳住他的状况。”
languages.original_text: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

traits.locale_text: “别这么心急，同僚。治疗要靠头脑，而非药物——这是医疗部最核心的智慧之一。”{n}解剖者盯着伤员的脸看了一会儿。{/n}“或许，大人的到来能给病人带来力量。请试着安抚病人，与此同时，我们会设法稳住他的状况。”

languages.text: « Pas si vite, cher collègue. Il faut soigner avec l'esprit plutôt que par la médication, c'est l'un des préceptes clés de l'Officio Medicae. » {n}L'espace de quelques secondes, le vivisecteur observe attentivement le visage du blessé.{/n} « La présence de Votre Seigneurie pourrait redonner courage au patient. Tâchez de le soutenir pendant que nous tentons de le stabiliser. »
languages.original_text: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

traits.locale_text: « Pas si vite, cher collègue. Il faut soigner avec l'esprit plutôt que par la médication, c'est l'un des préceptes clés de l'Officio Medicae. » {n}L'espace de quelques secondes, le vivisecteur observe attentivement le visage du blessé.{/n} « La présence de Votre Seigneurie pourrait redonner courage au patient. Tâchez de le soutenir pendant que nous tentons de le stabiliser. »

languages.text: "Bu kadar aceleci olma meslektaşım. İlaçla değil, zihinle iyileştir. Bu, Officio Medicae'nin temel bilgeliklerinden biridir." {n}Dirikesimci, birkaç saniye boyunca yaralı adamın yüzüne bakıyor.{/n} "Belki de {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin varlığı hastaya güç verir. Biz onun durumunu stabilize etmeye çalışırken hastaya destek olmaya çalışın."
languages.original_text: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

traits.locale_text: "Bu kadar aceleci olma meslektaşım. İlaçla değil, zihinle iyileştir. Bu, Officio Medicae'nin temel bilgeliklerinden biridir." {n}Dirikesimci, birkaç saniye boyunca yaralı adamın yüzüne bakıyor.{/n} "Belki de {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin varlığı hastaya güç verir. Biz onun durumunu stabilize etmeye çalışırken hastaya destek olmaya çalışın."

languages.text: 「急ぐことなかれ、同僚よ。薬ではなく心で癒すことこそ、医療局（オフィキオ・メディカエ）の重要な教えである。」{n}ヴィヴィセクターは傷ついた男の顔を見つめる。数秒後、彼は言った。{/n}「おそらく、貴殿の御臨席が患者の支えとなるでしょう。我々が患者の状態を安定させる間、貴殿は患者の支えとなっていただけますか。」
languages.original_text: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

traits.locale_text: 「急ぐことなかれ、同僚よ。薬ではなく心で癒すことこそ、医療局（オフィキオ・メディカエ）の重要な教えである。」{n}ヴィヴィセクターは傷ついた男の顔を見つめる。数秒後、彼は言った。{/n}「おそらく、貴殿の御臨席が患者の支えとなるでしょう。我々が患者の状態を安定させる間、貴殿は患者の支えとなっていただけますか。」

languages.text: "Nicht so hastig, Kollege. Heilt mit dem Verstand, nicht mit Medikamenten ... das ist eine Schlüsselweisheit des Officio Medicae." {n}Der Vivisektor betrachtet einige Sekunden lang das Gesicht des verwundeten Mannes.{/n} "Vielleicht gibt die Gegenwart Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} dem Patienten Kraft. Versucht, den Patienten zu unterstützen, während wir ihn stabilisieren."
languages.original_text: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."

Heilt mit dem Verstand, nicht mit Medikamenten ... das ist eine Schlüsselweisheit des Officio Medicae." {n}Der Vivisektor betrachtet einige Sekunden lang das Gesicht des verwundeten Mannes.{/n} "Vielleicht gibt die Gegenwart Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} dem Patienten Kraft. Versucht, den Patienten zu unterstützen, während wir ihn stabilisieren."
